title: 第二组小学拓展英语词卡

cards.hint: Add two apples to the basket.

cards.hint: Civilization helps people build cities, share ideas, and create art.
cards.example: Civilization helps people build cities, share ideas, and create art.

cards.hint: Creativity helps us find fun ways to solve problems.
cards.example: Creativity helps us find fun ways to solve problems.

cards.hint: Curiosity helps us discover wonderful things every day.
